arts.ttl: Bayern Munich chief hands Man City, Real Madrid additional Jamal Musiala transfer boost
arts.sum: Bayern Munich chief Max Eberl admits that it will be "difficult" to agree a contract extension with Manchester City and Real Madrid-linked Jamal Musiala.
